title: helianthus praecox var. hirtus
intro: Helianthus praecox var. hirtus, also known as the hairy common sunflower or hairy sunflower, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial actions. The hairy common sunflower is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Helianthus praecox var. hirtus is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its therapeutic properties.
